channel.title: fun on Articles, Translations, and Blog
channel.description: Recent content in fun on Articles, Translations, and Blog

item.title: Complexity solving catch-22
item.description: Today I’ve stumbled upon an amusing post “Software disenchantment” by Nikita Tonski which resonated with me quite a bit. The following fragment in particular:

item.title: Excellence
item.description: What exactly means “Center of Excellence”? Whatever we want it to mean. We should be brimming with excellence by nightfall. Centers of excellence create more excellence. Evidence? None.
